name: Candy Crush Blast
description: Candy Crush Blast is the ultimate candy match-3 adventure! Swap colorful candies to make matches, create powerful special candies and trigger epic chain reactions. Match 4 for striped candies, match 5 for color bombs, and combine them for explosive combos! Conquer 150 levels with unique goals — score targets, jelly clearing, chocolate blocking and ingredient collecting. Defeat 5 candy bosses and unlock endless mode. Three difficulty modes!
instructions: Swap candies to match 3 or more Create special candies for big blasts chain combos for huge scores 150 levels 5 bosses 3 difficulty modes
